ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "reg_no" TEXT /* Unique registration number for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the student belongs */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program (e.g., B.Tech, M.Tech, Ph.D.) */,
  "joining_year" INTEGER /* Year of joining the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reg_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Full name of the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is taught (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "ass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Reference to the course code */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., Internal, End Sem) */,
  "max_marks" INTEGER /* Maximum marks for the assessment */,
  "weightage" INTEGER /* Weightage of the assessment in the final grade */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the assessment submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "reg_no" TEXT /* Registration number of the student */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code for the assessment */,
  "ass_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment */,
  "marks_obtained" INTEGER /* Marks obtained by the student */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance score for the assessment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reg_no", "course_code", "ass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "final_grades" (
  "reg_no" TEXT /* Registration number of the student */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code for the course */,
  "end_sem_marks" INTEGER /* Marks obtained in the end-semester examination */,
  "total_marks" INTEGER /* Total marks including internal and end-semester assessments */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade received by the student (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reg_no", "course_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "reg_no" TEXT /* Registration number of the student */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code for the course */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "session" TEXT /* Session (e.g., Lecture, Tutorial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reg_no", "course_code", "attendance_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., faculty, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "department_email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses_instructors" (
  "course_code" TEXT /* Reference to the course code */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the instructor */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is taught (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_code", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Fall 2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_prerequisites" (
  "course_code" TEXT /* Reference to the course code */,
  "prerequisite_course" TEXT /* Prerequisite course code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_code", "prerequisite_course")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_advisors" (
  "reg_no" TEXT /* Registration number of the student */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reg_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_advisors_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique registration number for each student
Department to which the student belongs
Number of credits for the course
Semester in which the course is taught (e.g., Fall, Spring)
Type of assessment (e.g., Internal, End Sem)
Weightage of the assessment in the final grade
Grade received by the student (e.g., A, B, C)
Marks obtained in the end-semester examination
Total marks including internal and end-semester assessments
Final grade received by the student (e.g., A, B, C)
Role of the user (e.g., faculty, admin)
Name of the head of the department
Semester in which the course is taught (e.g., Fall, Spring)
